description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a robust metal frame and a dark, matte finish. The grip panels are made of wood, featuring a smooth surface with visible grain and a single screw securing each panel. The slide is rectangular with subtle beveling along the edges and a slightly rounded top, and it extends forward to a cylindrical barrel. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no visible extensions or finger rests. Minimal markings are present on the slide, with only faint engravings visible on one side.
description: A dark metal semi-automatic handgun with smooth wooden grip panels and a flat, flush magazine base. The slide is rectangular and subtly beveled, with minimal visible markings.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the slide and grip.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the wooden grip panel, the trigger guard, and faint slide engravings, as well as the overall length and proportions of the handgun.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the slide, the hammer, and the grip, emphasizing the symmetry and alignment of the handgun's components.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the opposite wooden grip panel, the trigger guard, and the slide, with no prominent markings visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features smooth, dark brown wooden panels with a subtle natural grain pattern and a single visible screw securing each side. The shape is gently contoured to fit the hand, with a slight palm swell and a rounded backstrap. There are no finger grooves, checkering, or stippling, giving the grip a classic, minimalist appearance. The wood finish is semi-glossy, and there are no visible logos or embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth, continuous curve and no undercuts or squared-off edges. It is of standard size, providing sufficient space for finger placement, and lacks any visible texturing, reinforcement, or integrated accessories. The design is utilitarian and unembellished.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, cylindrical, and non-threaded, with a smooth exterior and no visible compensators, ports, or fluting. The finish matches the matte black of the slide, and there are no prominent markings or external features on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are faint, shallow engravings on the left side of the slide, possibly indicating a model or serial number, but they are not clearly legible. No manufacturer logos, caliber designations, or decorative patterns are prominently visible.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, flaring, or finger rests. It is minimally contoured and lacks any visible logos, texturing, or embellishments, contributing to a streamlined and classic appearance.
